creator: freebsd@falz.net
text:
On Mon, Jun 16, 2008 at 6:46 PM, Wesley Shields <wxs@freebsd.org> wrote:
> This patch needs some work.  It does not respect prefix:
>
> ++PREFIX  = /usr/local
>
> Can you please fix this.  Also, the maintainer address bounced.  Would
> you be willing to maintain this port?

Sure, set email to freebsd@falz.net.
